title: SR Super Ribbons®™- Full Reel 15mm Double Faced Satin Ribbon, 20 Metres on Reel - Baby Blue
features: high quality ribbon on strong plastic spools

Usage: It is perfect for card making, clothing, crafts, decorations, Christmas and gift wrapping, florists, flowers and weddings ,hair bows, hairbow clips, woven headbands, scrapbooking and many other projects.
Occasion: Perfect for any occasion whether it's a wedding, Christmas or even a birthday this elegant and versatile satin ribbon will look beautiful for any occasion
Size : Available for 6 sizes & 33 Colours at our store, please search the size as you like 3mm X 50M - 6mm X 20M - 10mm X 20M - 15mm X 20M - 25mm X 20M - 38mm X 20M
description: From the manufacturer Bring you creativity to life! Super Ribbons is a UK-based business with a wide range of premium ribbons. From classic satin to vibrant organza, and in every size and colour imaginable, we’ve got the perfect ribbon for your craft, gift wrapping, or decorating needs. Occasion-Ready Suitable for birthdays, Christmas, or any celebration; adds a finishing touch to presents and party decor Weddings and events Ribbons add a touch of elegance to any event, from wedding bouquets and car decorations to favors, chair adornments, and beyond Elevate Ribbons bring vibrant color and charm to any celebration, transforming simple decorations into eye-catching highlights that make your party truly unforgettable Versatile Usage Suitable for any occasion. Christmas trees, wreaths, and wedding bouquets. Great for florists, scrapbooking, and baked goods Over 33 colours available Super strong plastic spools Organize and create with ease! Our premium ribbons come neatly wound on a durable plastic spool, designed for easy use and hassle-free storage. No tangles, no mess - just perfect ribbons, ready when you are! Sizes and lengths Widths: 3mm, 6mm, 10mm, 15mm, 20mm, 25mm, 38mm Lengths: 20 Meter and 50 Meter
